flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southwestern College fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 924).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southwestern College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.9k → $39.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southwestern College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.9k → $39.8k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Southwestern College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (32.6% → 28.6%).
